dashboard.label: AI RBA - Risk Analytics
dashboard.description: Risk score analytics and trending for AI-related detections across users, departments, and detection types.

search.query: index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" risk_object_type="user" | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk dc(search_name) as detection_count by risk_object | sort - total_risk | head 20 | rename risk_object as "User", total_risk as "Total Risk Score", detection_count as "Unique Detections"
index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" | timechart span=1h sum(risk_score) as total_risk count as event_count

index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk count as fires by search_name | sort - total_risk | rename search_name as "Detection", total_risk as "Total Risk Generated", fires as "Times Fired"

index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk count as fires dc(risk_object) as unique_entities by search_name | sort - fires | rename search_name as "Detection", total_risk as "Total Risk", fires as "Times Fired", unique_entities as "Unique Entities"

index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" risk_object_type="user" | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk dc(search_name) as detection_count values(search_name) as detections earliest(_time) as first_seen latest(_time) as last_seen by risk_object | sort - total_risk | head 20 | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | rename risk_object as "User", total_risk as "Total Risk", detection_count as "Detection Types", detections as "Detections Triggered", first_seen as "First Seen", last_seen as "Last Seen"

index=risk search_name="AI RBA - *" risk_object_type="user" | lookup identity_lookup_expanded identity as risk_object OUTPUT bunit as business_unit | eval business_unit=coalesce(business_unit, "Unknown") | stats sum(risk_score) as total_risk dc(risk_object) as unique_users count as event_count by business_unit | sort - total_risk | rename business_unit as "Business Unit", total_risk as "Total Risk", unique_users as "Unique Users", event_count as "Events"
